text.title: Terraform Project Structure and GitHub Actions CI/CD for AWS Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

conclusion.verdict: Local state + manual apply OK; revisit when adding staging.
Per-env dirs + S3+DDB backend + OIDC + sequential apply + prod approval

text.example: single_env=false → Per-env dirs + S3+DDB + OIDC. References rule per-env-dirs.
